Footer.description: Impact Solutions designs and deploys high-impact digital solutions for Africa.
Footer.newsletterDescription: Get our news and technical publications.
Footer.copyright: © {year} Impact Solutions SAS. All rights reserved.

hero.title: We build the digital infrastructure that <accent>moves Africa forward</accent>.
hero.subtitle: Impact Solutions designs, develops and deploys high-impact digital platforms for governments, international institutions and businesses transforming the continent.

mission.paragraph1: We are a pan-African digital engineering company. Our mission: accelerate Africa's digital transformation through technology solutions that address real development challenges.
mission.paragraph2: From digital health to digital governance, artificial intelligence and information systems, we design platforms that are robust, interoperable and built to scale.
mission.paragraph3: Our products — KEREYA, PASSBI, AFRIASSESS — prove this capability: solutions deployed in the field, serving populations and the institutions that support them.

expertiseSection.title: Full-stack engineering, from data to infrastructure

solutionsSection.title: Digital solutions designed for impact
solutionsSection.description: We build platforms that address key sector challenges and durably improve people's lives.

cta.title: Let's talk about your next digital project.
cta.subtitle: Institutions, funders, businesses: our team supports you from scoping to deployment.

history.title: Our story
history.body: Impact Solutions was founded on a conviction: Africa doesn't need imported solutions, but digital engineering designed for its own realities. [CLIENT-FILL: founding year, key milestones, countries of operation].

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Design digital solutions that durably improve essential services in Africa.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: Become the pan-African reference in impact-driven digital engineering, recognized by institutions, funders and industrial partners.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.body: We continuously explore new technological approaches to solve complex problems.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.body: We pursue technical rigor and quality at every stage, from scoping to deployment.

impact.title: Impact
impact.body: Every solution we build must produce a measurable effect in the field.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.body: Our platforms are designed to run stably, securely and durably.

openness.title: Openness
openness.body: We favor open standards and interoperability over technological silos.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.body: We work alongside our partners, not just for them.

ethics.title: Ethics
ethics.body: We place data protection and responsible technology use at the heart of our choices.

approach.title: Our approach
approach.body: We combine technical expertise, field understanding and methodological rigor to deliver solutions that last well beyond initial deployment.

team.title: Our team
team.body: [CLIENT-FILL: leadership team and key profiles presentation]

hero.title: Full-stack engineering, from strategy to deployment

digitalTransformation.title: Digital Transformation
digitalTransformation.body: We support institutions and businesses in the digital overhaul of their processes and services.
capabilities: Audit of existing processes and identification of digitalization opportunities
Change management support for business teams
Redesign of public and private services into digital journeys

softwareDevelopment.title: Software Development
softwareDevelopment.body: Custom web and mobile applications, robust, scalable and built to last.

cloudArchitecture.title: Cloud Architecture
cloudArchitecture.body: Secure, resilient cloud infrastructure optimized for performance and cost.
capabilities: Design of cloud and hybrid infrastructure

mobileApps.title: Mobile Applications
mobileApps.body: Native and cross-platform apps designed for real-world use, including limited connectivity.

gis.title: GIS
gis.body: Geographic information systems to map, analyze and steer development projects.
capabilities: Mapping and visualization of geospatial data
Monitoring and evaluation of territorial projects
Integration of satellite and field data

dataEngineering.title: Data Engineering
dataEngineering.body: Reliable data pipelines that turn raw information into informed decisions.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.body: Models and algorithms applied to health, governance and predictive analytics.
capabilities: Predictive models applied to social sectors
Decision support for health and governance

interoperability.title: Interoperability
interoperability.body: Integration of heterogeneous systems following international standards (FHIR, GTFS, open APIs).
capabilities: Integration of heterogeneous systems via APIs
Mapping and governance of integration flows

uxui.title: UX/UI
uxui.body: Clear, accessible interfaces designed for users with very diverse realities.
capabilities: User research and field usability testing

cybersecurity.title: Cybersecurity
cybersecurity.body: Protection of sensitive data and compliance with regulated sector requirements.
capabilities: Sensitive data protection and regulatory compliance

consulting.title: Strategic Consulting
consulting.body: Strategic support to scope, prioritize and succeed in complex digital projects.

hero.title: Platforms built for impact, proven in the field

kereya.name: KEREYA
kereya.body: KEREYA connects patients, healthcare professionals and facilities to improve access to care and continuity of medical journeys.

passbi.name: PASSBI
passbi.body: PASSBI optimizes public transport through real-time data and route planning.

afriassess.name: AFRIASSESS
afriassess.body: AFRIASSESS structures, centralizes and streamlines the evaluation of environmental and social project impacts.

custom.name: Custom Solutions
custom.body: We design custom digital platforms to address our partners' specific challenges, from scoping to deployment.

hero.title: Let's talk about your project
hero.subtitle: Do you have an institutional project, a partnership or a collaboration opportunity? Our team responds within 48 business hours.

form.nameError: Please enter your name (2 characters minimum).
form.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.
form.messageError: Your message must be at least 10 characters long.
form.privacyNote: Your data is handled confidentially and never shared with third parties.
form.successBody: Thank you, we'll get back to you within 48 business hours.
form.errorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
